caption: A woman is captured in a close-up shot, positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a pale yellow curtain. She has dark hair and is wearing a light purple, button-down collared shirt and black over-ear headphones. Throughout the sequence, she is looking toward the camera and speaking, with her mouth opening and closing as she talks. Small, legible text reading "Nancy Damya" appears in the bottom-left corner of the scene. The background and her positioning remain constant, while the only movement occurs in her facial expressions and lip movements as she continues to speak.
